series_metadata.series_title: Employers Payment of Income Tax Withheld
series_metadata.series_description: This form replaced the IT-941 (Old) in 1975. The purpose of this form and due dates are the same as for the IT-941 (Old). This is a one part form.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 6 months after scanned then destroy. ; Electronic: Record is maintained for 10 years via the ODT Info Image System, Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
